source_title: Pico della Mirandola on Trial: Heresy, Freedom, and Philosophy
access_notes: Full text available as Markdown conversion from PDF; OCR quality fair
notes: Companion volume to Magic and the Dignity of Man (2019). Analyzes Pico's Apology and the 13 condemned theses from the 900 Conclusions. Five chapters on Q1 (Hell), Q4 (Incarnation), Q6/Q9/Q10 (Eucharist), Q8 (will and heresy).
